playground.title: Klippo Playground
playground.subtitle: Beta — Pseudonymize texts and documents so you can use AI chatbots without exposing personal data. Data is deleted after 1 hour.
playground.description: Upload a document or paste text. Klippo detects names, addresses, phone numbers, and other personal data and replaces them with pseudonyms.
playground.heroTitle: You want to use AI – but not send your customer data along.
playground.heroDescription: Klippo turns your text into a version you can easily copy into chatbots: names, addresses, phone numbers, and similar details are replaced with placeholders.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Upload text or a document → Klippo detects personal data (names, addresses, phone numbers …) → You get a pseudonymized version you can copy into ChatGPT & co.

playground.betaNotice: This is a beta version of Klippo.
playground.betaTechnical: Content is only stored as long as needed for processing – and then automatically deleted (default: after 1 hour).

about.title: About me
about.description: I'm Andreas Seiler, software developer. I'm building Klippo because I believe you can use AI productively without exposing sensitive data.

fullAccess.title: Request full access
fullAccess.description: Drop a quick note about what you'd use Klippo for. No direct signup – I'll get back to you personally.

processing.title: Processing your document…
processing.description: Detection is running. This usually takes a few seconds.

playground.guestError: Could not start a guest session. Please try again later.
playground.dailyLimitReached: Daily limit reached. For full access, contact mail{'@'}andreas-seiler.net
playground.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
